claims.summary: Dynamic JSON-valued telemetry fields need bounded schema-on-read handling rather than unchecked key assumptions.
claims.disposition: Verified optional pointer/type/finite guards in `types/schema/telemetry.rs` and interpretation-side typed access.

claims.summary: Typed/legacy hybrid coherence must reject NaN and infinity without producing a numeric coherence.
claims.disposition: Added and passed `typed_and_legacy_fingerprint_reject_non_finite_hybrid_slots` for both NaN and infinity.

claims.summary: Legacy-only 32D fingerprints must reconstruct the canonical typed slot mapping deterministically.
claims.disposition: Verified existing slot-by-slot reconstruction and aligned-hybrid tests.

claims.summary: A validated 12D glimpse must remain lifetime-safe and reject malformed or non-finite values.
claims.disposition: Verified Rust borrow ownership plus exact 11D, 13D, short, and non-finite regressions.
